title: Is there anyway to prevent receiving item update event which is updated by ourself?
excerpt: We utilize Redux to ensure that whenever an item is updated, we receive fresh data and immediately incorporate it into our state management. However, it’s important to note that subsequent events may trigger additional u…

posts.author: thinhle183 (Thinh Le)
posts.cookedHtml: We utilize Redux to ensure that whenever an item is updated, we receive fresh data and immediately incorporate it into our state management. However, it’s important to note that subsequent events may trigger additional updates, potentially resulting in certain issues.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @thinhle183,

Are you referring to a way to prevent receiving a webhook if you have a “When an item is created” or “When a column changes” or something similar, if a specific user is the one triggering the event?
